basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Indore is recruiting a motivated JRF for an interdisciplinary project involving Machine Learning, NLP, and multilingual textual corpora. This is an excellent opportunity for candidates from Chemistry, Science, AI, and allied fields.

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: | Master’s in Chemistry, Science, AI, and allied disciplines OR M.Tech./M.S. in Chemistry or allied subjects Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA Valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET qualification | Desirable Qualification: | Good academic writing and communication skills

how_to_apply: Interested candidates must submit the following in a single PDF file to [email protected]:
Complete details of NET/GATE (year, marks, rank, etc.)
Incomplete applications will be rejected. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for online interview.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be paid for the interview. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidates can register for PhD at IIT Indore with extended fellowship.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Indore JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Indore JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (Research & Development Section) has invited applications for the post of Joint Research Fellow (JRF) in the ANRF-funded project at HSS and JPN National Centre. Download IIT Indore JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore JRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Indore is recruiting a motivated JRF for an interdisciplinary project involving Machine Learning, NLP, and multilingual textual corpora. This is an excellent opportunity for candidates from Chemistry, Science, AI, and allied fields.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore JRF Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
Job Description
content_sections.text: The JRF will develop and apply Machine Learning and NLP methods to multilingual textual corpora, build language processing pipelines, work with scholarly publishing data, metadata standards, FAIR-compliant infrastructures, and contribute to APIs, corpora, digital resources, technical reports, and research publications.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: Master’s in Chemistry, Science, AI, and allied disciplines OR M.Tech./M.S. in Chemistry or allied subjects Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA Valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET qualification Desirable Qualification: Good academic writing and communication skills

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Indore JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates must submit the following in a single PDF file to [email protected] : Detailed CV All educational certificates and marksheets GATE/NET qualifying certificates Date of Birth proof Complete details of NET/GATE (year, marks, rank, etc.) Incomplete applications will be rejected. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for online interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: No TA/DA will be paid for the interview. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidates can register for PhD at IIT Indore with extended fellowship.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Indore JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application is 30 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How much fellowship is provided for JRF at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: INR 37,000 + HRA as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the project title for IIT Indore ANRF JRF position?
faq.answer: LINKS (Language Infrastructure and Knowledge Systems).

faq.question: Q4. What qualification is required for IIT Indore JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Master’s in Chemistry/Science/AI or M.Tech/M.S. with GATE/CSIR-UGC NET.

faq.question: Q5. Is GATE mandatory for IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Yes, valid GATE or CSIR-UGC NET is mandatory.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IIT Indore JRF vacancy?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 28 years.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for IIT Indore JRF position?
faq.answer: Send all documents in a single PDF to [email protected]

faq.question: Q8. When is the interview for IIT Indore JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The interview is scheduled on 10 August 2026 for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Can selected JRF candidate pursue PhD at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates will be encouraged to register for PhD with extended fellowship.

faq.question: Q10. What department is the LINKS project under at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: HSS and JPN National Centre.
